title: Video by fit_4_football
description:
⚽️RESPECT⚽️

Winners don’t want to see other people do badly or LOSE! Winners just want to win! In this video I am explaining the importance of showing others respect and only focusing on your own journey and you doing better! You should never focus your attention on someone else doing badly! ⚽️

Just shut out the noise and focus on yourself ⚽️

#footballfitness #socceracademy #footballdrills #footballelite
